suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve contradictory expectations for scenario diff behavior with non-existent IDs so reviewers and validators use one canonical expected behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `fix-scrutiny-foundations` noted VAL-AUTHZ-007 expects 403/404 while VAL-BUGFIX-004 expects 200 + empty arrays for non-existent scenario IDs.
